title: Oracle Revenue Management Billing Training
description:
Oracle Revenue Management Billing training covers concepts from the Basic level to the advanced level.  Whether you are an individual or corporate client we can customize training course content as per your requirement.  And can arrange this Oracle Revenue Management Billing training as per your pace.

This Oracle Revenue and Management Billing training or ORMB training will give you solid foundational knowledge of the product's functional features and capabilities. This training shows you how ORMB serves the needs of a wide variety of banking and financial services companies, including retail, investment & corporate banking, capital markets, payments and credit cards.

Aftre the completion of this Oracle Revenue and Management Billing training you will be able to understand the key features & functionality of ORMB, Navigate the product architecture and understand the product value proposition, understand how the application can be configured or extended to meet a customer's business requirements.
curriculum:
Overview & Introduction to ORMB
Understanding the User Interface
Understanding Framework Concepts
Understanding Customer Maintenance
Understanding Product Maintenance
Rates,Pricing
Adjustments
Billing
Transaction Feed Management
Financial Transactions
Understanding Payments
Collecting Overdue Debts Using Overdue Processing
To Do and Security
Case Management
Understanding Refund and Write Off Request
